title: WeBuild – AuthorisedSignatories Attestation – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of an AuthorisedSignatories Attestation as defined in the AuthorisedSignatories Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type identifier. SHALL be 'eu.we-build:authorisedsignatories:1'.

iss.description: Issuer of the attestation. Identifies the legal entity that self-issued the AuthorisedSignatories Attestation. Follows RFC 7519.

iat.description: Issuance date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Represents the date and time when the attestation was issued (ISO 8601 / RFC 7519). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

exp.description: Expiry date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Represents the date and time when the attestation expires (ISO 8601 / RFC 7519). SHALL be later than 'iat'. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

jti.description: JWT ID — a unique identifier for the attestation token. Follows RFC 7519.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2. For the AuthorisedSignatories Attestation self-issued by the legal entity, this SHALL be 'EAA'. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

schema_version.description: Version of the AuthorisedSignatories attestation schema used. SHALL be a non-empty string when present.

legal_entity.description: Identifies the legal entity that issued the attestation and on whose behalf the authorised persons act. SHALL appear exactly once. SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

legal_person.description: The official legal name and legal form of the entity issuing the attestation.

legal_person_name.description: The complete official legal name of the legal entity.

legal_form_type.description: The legal form of the legal entity (e.g., GmbH, S.A., Ltd, BV).

identifier.description: Legal identifiers for the entity. The EUID is mandatory; LEI and tax number are optional.

euid.description: The European Unique Identifier (EUID) of the legal entity per Directive (EU) 2017/1132. SHALL be a non-empty string.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) per ISO 17442. When present, SHALL be exactly 20 characters.

tax.description: National company tax or registration number. Optional.

authorised_persons.description: Array of authorised person objects. SHALL contain at least one entry. Each entry represents a natural person authorised to act on behalf of the legal entity. SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

items.description: A single authorised person entry containing personal, role, and optionally identification information.

natural_person.description: Core personal identity attributes of the authorised person. All three fields are mandatory.

first_name.description: The first names in full (including all given names and middle names) of the authorised person.

surname.description: The surnames in full (all family names/last names) of the authorised person.

date_of_birth.description: Day, month, and year of birth of the authorised person per ISO 8601. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

birth_place.description: Place of birth of the authorised person. Locality and country are mandatory; region is optional.

locality.description: Locality (city or town) where the natural person was born.

country.description: Country where the natural person was born. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code.

region.description: Optional additional detail on the region or state of birth.

citizenship.description: Nationality or nationalities of the authorised person. SHALL contain at least one valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code.

items.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing a nationality held by the person.

person_role.description: Role and representation power of the authorised person within the legal entity. representation_type is mandatory; role is optional.

representation_type.description: The nature of the power of representation. SHALL be one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.1: 'SOLE' (single signatory has full authority) or 'JOINT' (multiple signatories required).

role.description: The role of the authorised person within the company (e.g., CEO, CFO, Director). Optional.

residence_address.description: Optional residential address of the authorised person. When present, country SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code.

address.description: The street address where the authorised person currently resides.

locality.description: The city where the authorised person currently resides.

postal_code.description: The postal or ZIP code of the authorised person's address.

region.description: The state, province, or region of the authorised person's address.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the authorised person resides.

identifier.description: Optional identity document details for enhanced identification of the authorised person. When present, ALL FOUR fields SHALL be provided together: document_type, document_number, issuing_country, and document_expiry_date.

document_type.description: Type of the identity document. SHALL use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.2.

document_number.description: The number of the identity document (passport number, national ID number, etc.).

issuing_country.description: The country that issued the identity document. SHALL be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code.

document_expiry_date.description: The expiration date of the identity document per ISO 8601. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when the technical validity period (exp - iat) is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For the AuthorisedSignatories Attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the AuthorisedSignatories Attestation can be found or looked up. When present, SHALL be a valid URI.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended. The AuthorisedSignatories Attestation SHALL be cryptographically bound to the specific holder wallet.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder wallet.

crv.description: Elliptic curve name (e.g., 'P-256'). Required for EC keys.

x.description: X coordinate of the EC public key (Base64url encoded).

y.description: Y coordinate of the EC public key (Base64url encoded).

n.description: RSA modulus (Base64url encoded). Required for RSA keys.

e.description: RSA public exponent (Base64url encoded). Required for RSA keys.
